scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "bun run dev:frontend" "bun run dev:backend"
scripts.build:all: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.preview: bun run build:all && concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "cd frontend && bun run start" "cd backend && bun run start:prod"
scripts.lint: cd frontend && bun run lint && cd ../backend && bun run lint
